prompt:
Goal: Create a wordless six-panel cinematic storyboard/comic page in a loose watercolor-and-ink style about a faceless yellow humanoid marked with a glowing number changing from 14 to 15 while protecting a pink humanoid in a crowded public square.

Canvas: Landscape page, approximately 4:3 aspect ratio, divided into exactly 6 panels with thin black gutters. Arrange the panels in a 2-column by 3-row grid, with each panel having slightly different camera distance and action framing.

Visual style: Soft hand-painted watercolor, muted blue-gray crowd, expressive sketchy outlines, gentle paper texture, cinematic motion blur, natural daylight, dramatic action composition. The background is a crowded European-style plaza with pale stone paving and ornate white Gothic cathedral spires under a bright blue sky. The crowd should be faceless or indistinct, wearing dark coats and moving urgently, so the colored humanoids stand out.

Characters: The main figure is a smooth faceless golden yellow humanoid runner with simplified anatomy and no clothing, initially marked with a small glowing pale-blue number 14 on the shoulder/upper arm. The protected figure is a smooth faceless pink humanoid, smaller and vulnerable. The main figure later bears a glowing pale-blue number 15 on the shoulder. No other readable text appears.

Layout and panel content: Use exactly 6 discrete panels. Panel 1, top left: rear three-quarter view of the yellow figure pushing through a moving crowd, body twisted as if grabbed or chased, glowing "14" visible on the upper back/shoulder. Panel 2, top right: frontal action shot of the yellow figure running toward the viewer with one hand outstretched, "14" glowing on the right shoulder, cathedral and crowd behind. Panel 3, middle left: rear long shot of the yellow figure sprinting away through a corridor of legs and people, the crowd framing the runner, cathedral in the distance. Panel 4, middle right: the yellow figure kneels or leans over the pink figure on the ground, holding them protectively with one hand on the shoulder and one hand near the torso; "14" is still visible on the yellow shoulder. Panel 5, bottom left: close-up crop of the yellow shoulder with the glowing number "15" replacing the previous number, the pink figure partly visible at the edge, crowd blurred in the background. Panel 6, bottom right: intimate close-up of the yellow figure and pink figure; the yellow figure touches or peels back a ragged, scratched patch on the shoulder, revealing the glowing "15" beneath, with torn-looking ochre marks around the number.

Constraints: Keep the image entirely wordless except for the glowing numbers 14 and 15. Do not add speech bubbles, captions, logos, watermarks, extra panels, or additional numbered characters. Maintain consistent character colors and body shapes across all panels.
